reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar para hacer una parada en el viaje por Ruta 2.
Muy cuidado, vista hermosa, arboledas baños impecables, parrillas, bebederos..
Muy bien pensado el lugar para el viajero!

(Translated by Google)
A beautiful place to stop on a Route 2 trip. Very well maintained, beautiful view, groves of trees, spotless restrooms, grills, drinking fountains... A very well-designed spot for travelers!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURROGZEUGZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Lugar muy bueno para hacer una escala y/o descanso, como todo ACA excelentrs servicios. Baños limpios a pesat de la cantidad de gente, muy buena parquizacion para estirar las piernas y recrear, y sobretodo espacio para mascotas. Muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
A great place for a stopover and/or rest, with excellent service, as always at ACA. The restrooms are clean despite the number of people, the grounds are very nice for stretching your legs and relaxing, and above all, there's space for pets. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRMGNYeE1nEAE
